answers.answer: ExtensionActivationTimes class captures: startup (time from VS Code startup to activation start), codeLoadingTime (time to load extension code), and activateCallTime (time spent in the activate() function)
FailedExtension class, passes null for module, null for exports, false for activationFailed, and the activation error to parent ActivatedExtension
environmentVariableCollection property, backed by IExtHostTerminalService or ExtHostTerminalService
Three valid values: 'visible', 'hidden', 'collapsed'. Default value is 'visible'
_alreadyActivatedEvents is a Map<string, boolean> that tracks which activation events have already been processed. activateByEvent checks this map to avoid redundant activations for the same event
Approximately 50-60 proxy identifiers. Three notebook-related: MainThreadNotebook, MainThreadNotebookDocuments, MainThreadNotebookEditors
50 milliseconds time budget for deferring onStartupFinished extension activations
statusBarItem.errorBackground maps to StatusbarEntryKind.Error, statusBarItem.warningBackground maps to StatusbarEntryKind.Warning
assertRegistered() method is called to verify all proxy identifiers were properly registered
ExtensionHostKind.LocalProcess, ExtensionHostKind.LocalWebWorker, ExtensionHostKind.Remote
AverageBufferSize constant is 65535 (64KB)
lf_left (line feeds in left subtree) and size_left (character count in left subtree)
LARGE_FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD (50MB), LARGE_FILE_LINE_COUNT_THRESHOLD (300000 lines), and LONG_LINE_BOUNDARY (10000 characters)
Cache limit is 1 (single entry cache). When limit is reached, the oldest entry is replaced
cursors[0] is the primary cursor (selection), and the rest are secondary cursors. Operations often treat the primary cursor specially
Simple, Word, Line
MIN_SAFE_DELTA and MAX_SAFE_DELTA are used to prevent integer overflow in delta calculations. Values are approximately -1073741824 and 1073741824 (2^30)
Default ordinal value is 10000 when neither ordinal nor afterColumn is specified
EXACT, ABOVE, BELOW
If CRLF count is greater than LF count, EOL normalizes to CRLF; otherwise LF. Specifically checks if crlfCount > lfCount
HEIGHT constant is 22 pixels
TOP, TITLE, BOTTOM
ACTION_HEIGHT is 48 pixels. Storage keys: 'workbench.activity.pinnedViewlets' or 'workbench.activity.pinnedViewlets2'
minimumWidth is 170 pixels, activeViewletSettingsKey is 'workbench.sidebar.activeviewletid'
HEADER_HEIGHT: 35, TITLE_HEIGHT: 35, FOOTER_HEIGHT: 26
minimumHeight is 77 pixels. preferredHeight is calculated from stored memento or defaults to 300
SIDEBAR_VISIBLE, PANEL_VISIBLE, AUXILIARYBAR_VISIBLE, STATUSBAR_VISIBLE, ACTIVITYBAR_VISIBLE
MIN_COMPOSITE_BAR_WIDTH is 50 pixels. Empty pane message is 'No views are enabled'
ARIA role is 'toolbar' and label is 'Active View Switcher' or similar localized string
35 pixels when command center is visible
$di$dependencies (array of service dependencies) and $di$target (the original constructor)
When true, allows the service to be instantiated lazily via a proxy rather than eagerly, improving startup performance
Eager (0) and Delayed (1)
lookupOrInsertNode method with cycle detection via a 'visiting' flag or similar DFS-based approach
PROFILE = 0, WORKSPACE = 1, APPLICATION = 2
Starting (1), Ready (2), Restored (3), Eventually (4)
Returns the previous value associated with the service identifier, or undefined if none existed
Default flush interval is 100 milliseconds
Validates that the decorator is only used as a parameter decorator. Throws error if used as property or method decorator
BrowserLifecycleService cannot truly veto shutdown in browsers due to web platform limitations. It may show a beforeunload dialog but cannot programmatically cancel navigation
250 milliseconds default delay
AI-generated code actions are sorted after non-AI code actions (lower priority in the default sort)
codelens.contribution or CodeLensContribution.ID
Storage key is 'codelens/cache', old key was 'codelens/cache/v1' or similar versioned key
1) contents array is not empty, 2) at least one content item has non-empty value
hoverOrdinal is 1
Top, Inline, Bottom
15% or 1 in 7 telemetry reports are actually sent (sampling)
editor.occurrencesHighlightDelay
4 different icon variations: autofix, quickfix, lightbulb, and lightbulb with AI indicator
LinkedList or Map<string, ICommand> data structure
workbench.menu.hidden or menu.hiddenCommands
noop or a default empty command for testing purposes
It also includes all commands from the global command registry that have no menu registration, making them accessible via command palette
An error is thrown indicating duplicate MenuId identifier
1) The command in CommandsRegistry, 2) A menu item in MenuRegistry for CommandPalette, 3) A keybinding if specified
50 milliseconds default debounce delay
Key is constructed from menuId and commandId concatenated, like `${menuId}/${commandId}`
The 'navigation' group is always sorted first/at the top before other groups
workbench.action.resetMenuHiddenStates or menuHiddenStates.reset
